zh.lifeSummary: 當Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette於1256年出生在瑞士時，他的父親Theobald de Ferrette I29歲，母親Agnes de Vergy22歲。他於1279年8月12日與Katharina von Klingen在瑞士瑟爾高恩望阿爾騰可林根結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1311年2月7日在德國享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette于1256年出生在瑞士时，他的父亲Theobald de Ferrette I29岁，母亲Agnes de Vergy22岁。他于1279年8月12日与Katharina von Klingen在瑞士瑟爾高恩望阿爾騰可林根结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1311年2月7日在德国享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Pfirt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Peart
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Perth (Perths), which is recorded as Pertc. 1128. The placename derives from Pictish perta ‘(at the) thicket, copse’.
English: nickname, probably from a shortened form of Middle English, Old French apert ‘open, plain to see’, of persons ‘frank, honest’ or ‘accomplished’.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Japanese: written 井伊 ‘well’ and ‘that’, the name one of Japan's great daimyō families, originally based in Tōtōmi (now part of Shizuoka prefecture), later in Kōzuke (now Gunma prefecture) and Ōmi (now Shiga prefecture). Other variants of the name substitute either character with similar sounding characters such as 飯 ‘cooked rice’, 居 ‘residence’, and so forth. It was formerly Romanized as Iyi. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Roman number II (meaning ‘the second’, i.e. ‘the younger’ of the two bearers of the name) is apparently also counted as a surname Ii.

History: Ii Naomasa (1561–1602) was awarded lands in Kōzuke and Ōmi for his service in the civil wars that won the shōgunate (military dictatorship) for Tokugawa Ieyasu. His family built the beautiful castle of Hikone, which still stands. His descendant Ii Naosuke (1815–1860) ruled Japan for two years as Tairō (Great Elder) and played a major part in signing treaties that opened Japan to foreign trade at the end of the Tokugawa Shōgunate. He was assassinated by adherents of the anti-foreign party.

nameMeanings.name: Theobald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from þeud ‘people, race’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. The first element was altered under the influence of Greek theos ‘god’. This name was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain.

historicEvents.description: Three valleys in Central Switzerland unite against the counts of Habsburg and fight for autonomy. Cities join the confederacy. They conquer territories in northern and southern Switzerland.

en.lifeSummary: When Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette was born in 1256, in Switzerland, his father, Theobald de Ferrette I, was 29 and his mother, Agnes de Vergy, was 22. He married Katharina von Klingen on 12 August 1279, in Altenklingen, Engwang, Thurgau, Switzerland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 7 February 1311, in Germany, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette est né en 1256, à Suisse, son père, Theobald de Ferrette I, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Vergy, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Katharina von Klingen le 12 août 1279, à Altenklingen, Engwang, Turgovie, Suisse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 7 février 1311, à Allemagne, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette 1256 in Schweiz geboren wurde, war sein Vater Theobald de Ferrette I 29 und seine Mutter Agnes de Vergy 22. Er hat am 12. August 1279 in Altenklingen, Engwang, Thurgau, Schweiz Katharina von Klingen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Februar 1311 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette è nato il nel 1256 nel Svizzera, il suo padre, Theobald de Ferrette I, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Vergy, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Katharina von Klingen il 12 agosto 1279, nel Altenklingen, Engwang, Turgovia, Svizzera. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 7 febbraio 1311, nel Germania, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferretteが1256年にスイスで生まれた時，父Theobald de Ferrette Iは29歳，母Agnes de Vergyは22歳であった。1279年8月12日にスイススウルガウエングワンアルテンクリンジェンでKatharina von Klingenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1311年2月7日にドイツで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette(이)가 1256년 스위스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Theobald de Ferrette I(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Vergy(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1279년 8월 12일 스위스 스르가 잉왕 알텐클링에서 Katharina von Klingen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1311년 2월 7일 독일에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette nasceu em 1256, em Suiça, seu pai, Theobald de Ferrette I, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Vergy, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Katharina von Klingen em 12 de agosto de 1279, em Altenklingen, Engwang, Thurgau, Suiça. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de fevereiro de 1311, em Alemanha, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette родился в 1256 г. в местности Швейцария, его отцу по имени Theobald de Ferrette I было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Vergy, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Katharina von Klingen 12 августа 1279 г. в местности алтенклинген, энгванг, тургау, Швейцария. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 7 февраля 1311 г. в местности Германия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette nació en 1256, en Suiza, su papá, Theobald de Ferrette I, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Agnes de Vergy, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Katharina von Klingen el 12 de agosto de 1279, en Altenklingen, Engwang, Thurgau, Suiza. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 7 de febrero de 1311, en Alemania, a la edad de 55 años.
